ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "calendar_year" INTEGER /* Calendar year for the data */,
  "acara_sml_id" INTEGER /* ACARA SML ID for school identification */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Age ID to denote the age range of the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postcode of the school */,
  "school_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "campus_type" TEXT /* Type of campus (e.g., single entity, multi-campus) */,
  "school_url" TEXT /* URL of the school's official website */,
  "governing_body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the governing body overseeing the school */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers currently employed */,
  "average_class_size" REAL /* Average class size in the school */,
  "number_of_campuses" INTEGER /* Number of campuses the school operates */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "principal_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_governing_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("governing_body_id") REFERENCES governing_bodies ("governing_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governing_bodies" (
  "governing_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governing body */,
  "body_name" TEXT /* Name of the governing body */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Type of governing body (e.g., Catholic Education Office, Independent Schools) */,
  "body_url" TEXT /* URL of the governing body's website */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the governing body was established */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools under the governing body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governing_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrolments" (
  "enrolment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrolment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school ID */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years for enrolments (e.g., Prep-6) */,
  "total_enrolments" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "girls_enrolments" INTEGER /* Number of girls enrolled */,
  "boys_enrolments" INTEGER /* Number of boys enrolled */,
  "indigenous_enrolments" REAL /* Percentage of indigenous enrolments */,
  "non_english_speaking_enrolments" REAL /* Percentage of non-English speaking enrolments */,
  "yearly_enrolment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of enrolments over the past few years (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "enrolment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the school */,
  "enrolment_status" TEXT /* Current enrolment status (e.g., open, closed, waitlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrolment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrolments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staffing" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staffing record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school ID */,
  "teaching_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of teaching staff */,
  "fte_teaching_staff" REAL /* Full Time Equivalent (FTE) of teaching staff */,
  "non_teaching_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of non-teaching staff */,
  "fte_non_teaching_staff" REAL /* Full Time Equivalent (FTE) of non-teaching staff */,
  "fte_total_staff" REAL /* Full Time Equivalent (FTE) of total staff */,
  "number_of_admin_staff" INTEGER /* Number of administrative staff */,
  "fte_admin_staff" REAL /* Full Time Equivalent (FTE) of administrative staff */,
  "staff_turnover_rate" REAL /* Annual staff turnover rate */,
  "average_years_of_experience" REAL /* Average years of experience of teaching staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staffing_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icsea" (
  "icsea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ICSEA records */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school ID */,
  "icsea_score" INTEGER /* ICSEA score for the school */,
  "bottom_sea_quarter" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the bottom SEA quarter */,
  "lower_middle_sea_quarter" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the lower middle SEA quarter */,
  "upper_middle_sea_quarter" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the upper middle SEA quarter */,
  "top_sea_quarter" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top SEA quarter */,
  "icsea_trend" TEXT /* Trend of ICSEA scores over the past few years (e.g., improving, declining, stable) */,
  "icsea_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the school's ICSEA score within its region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icsea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icsea_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for location records */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school ID */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data (e.g., latitude and longitude) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the school is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the school's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for school types */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for school sectors */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Catholic, Independent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for user roles */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for access logs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
